summary: I craft high-performance web solutions that are fast, scalable, and built to thrive in the real world.

description: Contributed to the development of a large-scale corporate travel platform using React.js, implementing policy-driven booking workflows, dashboards, admin panels, and RBAC-based access control for secure user experiences.

Optimized Node.js (Express) backend services with MySQL and MongoDB, improving query performance by 35% through schema design, pagination and indexing, while enhancing frontend performance with centralized state management and lazy loading, reducing load time by 40%.
Built an AI-powered chatbot interface with real-time capabilities using HTTP streaming and voice transcription to improve user engagement and responsiveness.
Designed and implemented an Excel data processing system with dynamic querying and reporting features; integrated cloud storage and scalable file handling using secure pre-signed URL mechanisms.
Developed responsive UI components using React.js, JavaScript, and Tailwind CSS.
Integrated REST APIs to enable dynamic data rendering across application modules.
Improved UI performance and maintainability through component reuse and code optimization.
Worked closely with designers and backend developers to deliver production-ready features.

projects.title: Aspiration Trail
projects.description: A gamified learning platform that helps users track skill growth through structured challenges, leaderboards, and performance dashboards, encouraging consistent learning and competitive progress.

projects.title: Community Track
projects.description: A collaborative task management system that improves team coordination by providing role-based access, clear task visibility, and structured project tracking to reduce workflow confusion.

achievements.title: Winner - SYM2024 Hackathon
achievements.description: Recognized for rapid problem-solving, teamwork, and end-to-end development of innovative solutions.
